category_sources: source_facts.description says collection of macOS command-line utilities; official GitHub README describes osxutils as a collection/suite of MacOS X command line utilities.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is osxutils; official GitHub README heading is osxutils.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the official documentation surface for the maintained fork.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/specious/osxutils, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists multiple macOS utility commands; official GitHub README describes a suite of MacOS X command line utilities.
